title: Obstetrics/Gynecology - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Obstetrics/Gynecology 46 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Pregnancy Complications Veterans No Filter LGBTQ2+ Individuals Pregnancy Complications Veterans 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Reproductive Health (RH) Program oversees a statewide network of certified health care providers to ensure access to a suite of reproductive health services (including preventive reproductive health care, preconception and contraception). Services include annual gynecological exams (including pap tests, breast exams and STI screening); pregnancy testing; birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception, abortion referrals, obstetrics and gynecology services. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Individuals with a household income below 250% FPL Services are provided to all individuals regardless of ability to pay, race, color, national origin, immigration status, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, or disability. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6pm Email (541) 672-9596 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG AVIVA HEALTH WOMEN’S AND REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CLINIC WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Reproductive Health (RH) Program oversees a statewide network of certified health care providers to ensure access to a suite of reproductive health services (including preventive reproductive health care, preconception and contraception). Services include annual gynecological exams (including pap tests, breast exams and STI screening); pregnancy testing; birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception, abortion referrals, obstetrics and gynecology services. 2460 NW Stewart Parkway Suite 240 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals with a household income below 250% FPL Services are provided to all individuals regardless of ability to pay, race, color, national origin, immigration status, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, or disability. Hours: Monday 7am-3:30pm, Tuesday 12:30pm-3:30pm, Wednesday 10am-3:30pm Email (541) 672-9596 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BORLAND FREE CLINIC PRIMARY CARE COMMUNITY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Providies a community clinic offering primary and some speciality care. Also offers gynecological services, mental health care, physical therapy, diabetes education classes, prescription medicine discounts, assistance in applying for OHP, referrals to outside providers, and information about other social services. 3550 SW Borland Road Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Individuals who are at or below 400% of the Federal Poverty Line (FPL) Hours: Monday/Thursday 3pm-7pm, Wednesday 9am-1pm Email (503) 974-8887 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DR MAUREEN BECKER ND INTEGRATED MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an integrated approach to family and community medicine. Uses alternative and conventional medicine to provide services, including annual wellness exams, immunizations, gynecological exams, and sports physicals that focus on people of all ages. Also offers Oregon Department of Transportation physicals. 5013 SE Hawthorne Boulevard Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm Email (503) 736-9900 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM GOOD SHEPHERD WOMEN'S CENTER WOMEN'S CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services and support for menstrual cycle, incontinence, fertility and infertility, prolapse, infections, and other women's health conditions. Services include breast exams and mammograms, prenatal, childbirth, and postpartum care, lactation support, annual gynecological exams, STI/STD testing and treatment, contraceptives, tubal ligation services, and abortion services. For male sterilization (vasectomy), contact the Urology Clinic at 503-346-1500. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of any age Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ORCHID HEALTH ORCHID HEALTH HOODLAND CLINIC GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community clinic providing family medicine such as general medical care, women's health, and pediatrics.
